---
title: "Gallery"
---

## Demo cases

::: {.case-card}
### Aqaba LSD NC8 angm40

Interactive 3D view of landslide tsunami case AQA_005_K1_NC8_angm40_mixed in the Gulf of Aqaba.

[Open case](cases/aqaba_lsd_nc8_angm40.qmd)
:::

::: {.case-card}
### Aqaba LSE C10 angm40

Interactive 3D view of landslide tsunami case AQA_020_K1_C10_angm40_mixed in the Gulf of Aqaba.

[Open case](cases/aqaba_lse_c10_angm40.qmd)
:::

::: {.case-card}
### Aqaba LSF NC10 angm30

Interactive 3D view of landslide tsunami case AQA_008_K1_NC10_angm30_mixed in the Gulf of Aqaba.

[Open case](cases/aqaba_lsf_nc10_angm30.qmd)
:::
